en:
I wanted to buy a bottle of juice from the machine.
But the machine only takes coins, and I had no change.
There were some notes in my wallet, but no coins at all.
I asked my friend, "Do you have any small change?"
He smiled and gave me three coins.
"Thank you! I don't want to spend too much cash today," I said.
"I will give the coins back to you tomorrow."
cn:
我想从售货机买一瓶果汁。
可这台机器只收硬币，我却没有零钱。
我钱包里有几张纸币，一枚硬币都没有。
我问我的朋友：“你有零钱吗？”
他笑了笑，给了我三枚硬币。
“谢谢！我今天不想花太多现金，”我说。
“我明天就把硬币还给你。”

en:
Last night everyone was asleep, and the house was very quiet.
Suddenly I heard a soft noise downstairs.
Someone knocked on the door again and again.
My parents were sleeping upstairs, so I went down alone.
I did not answer the door at once.
Then I looked out and saw our neighbour.
He forgot his key and knocked for help.
cn:
昨晚大家都睡着了，屋子里非常安静。
忽然，我听到楼下有轻轻的响声。
有人一次又一次地敲门。
我父母在楼上睡觉，所以我一个人下了楼。
我没有马上去开门。
然后我往外一看，看见是我们的邻居。
他忘带钥匙了，敲门来求助。

en:
This morning little Tommy had breakfast alone.
He was hungry, so he wanted his milk and bread.
When his mother went to the kitchen, Tommy played with his food.
He spilt the milk all over the table.
Then he threw the bread from his plate onto the floor.
He did not finish his egg, but he laughed happily.
His mother came back and saw everything.
cn:
今天早上，小汤米一个人吃早餐。
他饿了，所以想要他的牛奶和面包。
当妈妈去厨房时，汤米玩起了食物。
他把牛奶洒得满桌都是。
然后他又把盘子里的面包扔到了地上。
他没有把鸡蛋吃完，却笑得很开心。
妈妈回来后，看到了这一切。

en:
Our teacher told us a true story today.
Many years ago, there was a king in a far country.
The king lived in a big palace with the queen.
His soldiers were all very brave.
One day something strange happened, and it changed the whole country.
The soldiers were afraid, but the king was calm.
We all wanted to know the end of the story.
cn:
今天老师给我们讲了一个真实的故事。
很多年以前，一个遥远的国家有一位国王。
国王和王后住在一座大宫殿里。
他的士兵个个都很勇敢。
有一天，发生了一件奇怪的事，它改变了整个国家。
士兵们都很害怕，可国王却很镇定。
我们都想知道这个故事的结局。

en:
Yesterday evening I was walking home alone.
At the corner I noticed a man in a black hat behind me.
When I walked slowly, he walked slowly too.
When I walked fast, he was following me again.
I was a little afraid, so I turned around.
Suddenly the man went round the next corner.
Then he was gone, and the street was quiet again.
cn:
昨天傍晚，我一个人走在回家的路上。
在街角，我注意到身后有一个戴黑帽子的男人。
我走得慢，他也走得慢。
我走得快，他又跟了上来。
我有点害怕，于是回过头去。
突然，那个男人在下一个拐角拐了弯。
接着他就不见了，街道又安静了下来。

en:
Next month my family is going to make a trip to Australia.
We are going to visit my uncle there.
We will travel by plane, and the journey will take about twelve hours.
We will arrive in Sydney in the morning.
I am going to see the sea and the big zoo.
My uncle will meet us at the airport.
I think it will be a wonderful trip.
cn:
下个月，我们全家要去澳大利亚旅行。
我们打算去那里看望我叔叔。
我们会坐飞机去，这段旅程大约要十二个小时。
我们将在早上到达悉尼。
我打算去看大海和那座大动物园。
我叔叔会到机场来接我们。
我想这一定会是一次很棒的旅行。

en:
My friend came to my house this afternoon.
"Please sit down. I'll make you a cup of tea," I said.
I put some water in the kettle and boiled it.
"Would you like some sugar in your tea?" I asked.
"No, thank you. I don't want any sugar," she said.
So I poured the tea into two cups.
We drank our tea and had a happy afternoon together.
cn:
今天下午，我的朋友来我家做客。
“请坐。我给你泡杯茶，”我说。
我往水壶里接了些水，把水烧开。
“你的茶里要放点糖吗？”我问。
“不用了，谢谢。我不要糖，”她说。
于是我把茶倒进两个杯子里。
我们一起喝着茶，度过了一个愉快的下午。
